summary: Tested Mini Migration Health Score feature on Migration Observability page. Backend pytest (5/5 passed) validates health_score block contract with status/display_status/calculated_at/time_window/time_window_label/reasons/operational_guidance/signals. API returns Yellow status with 120 stale pending events (correct per threshold rules). Frontend renders health score card with all components: status badge, time window label, reasons panel, signals panel (failed_outbox, stale_pending, audit_gap, compare_error, max_mismatch_rate). All tabs (Overview, Outbox, Audit, Shadow) navigable. Refresh button keeps page stable.
features_tested: health_score contract includes status, display_status, calculated_at, time_window, time_window_label, reasons, operational_guidance, signals ✅
signals include failed_outbox_count, stale_pending_count, audit_gap_count, compare_error_count, max_mismatch_rate_percent ✅
Frontend MigrationObservabilityPage renders health score card correctly ✅
Health score UI shows Yellow status badge ✅
Health score UI shows 'Last 24h' time window label ✅
Health score UI shows reasons panel with '120 stale pending event' ✅
Health score UI shows all signals (0/120/0/0/%0) ✅
All stat cards present (throughput, pending, shadow mismatch, event lag) ✅
All tabs navigable (Overview, Outbox, Audit, Shadow) ✅
Refresh button works - page remains stable ✅

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being 0 or -1 during initial render - non-blocking, charts display correctly after data loads

critical_code_review_comments: build_health_score() correctly implements threshold rules: Green (failed_outbox=0, stale_pending=0, mismatch<1%, compare_error=0), Yellow (stale_pending>0, mismatch 1-5%, compare_error>0), Red (failed_outbox>0, mismatch>5%, audit_gap>0)
health_score response contract is complete with status, display_status, calculated_at, time_window, time_window_label, reasons (max 3), operational_guidance, signals
Frontend correctly displays all health score components via data-testid attributes for robust testing
20-second auto-refresh interval with silent mode prevents loading flicker

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all health score UI elements render correctly, tabs navigable, refresh stable)

seed_data_creation: Tests use existing outbox_events and audit_logs, inserting temporary test data for validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mini Migration Health Score feature fully tested. Health score shows Yellow due to 120 stale pending events in preview environment (expected based on threshold rules). All health_score contract fields verified via API and UI. No regression in existing Migration Observability tabs/charts/tables. Login requires Enter key submission (known minor issue from previous iterations).

health_score_api_response.operational_guidance: Yellow → geçmeden önce gözlem ve inceleme gerekir

health_score_threshold_rules_verified.yellow_conditions: failed_outbox=0 but stale_pending>0, or mismatch 1-5%, or compare_error>0
health_score_threshold_rules_verified.red_conditions: failed_outbox>0, or mismatch>5%, with RED override if any audit gap detected
health_score_threshold_rules_verified.current_status_reason: Yellow because stale_pending=120 > 0, with no failed outbox or audit gaps
